description: Golden-question eval set for the Google Maps RAG Assistant. Each item specifies the question, the source URL(s) we expect the retriever to return, and either an expected-content fragment (substring match) or criteria for an LLM judge.

questions.question: I'm getting a RefererNotAllowedMapError on my production site. How do I fix it?
How much does the Routes API cost per request?
How do I use the new PlaceAutocompleteElement web component?
What Google Maps features are being deprecated in 2026?
How do I load the Maps JavaScript API in a React app?
Does Google Maps Platform still offer a $200 monthly credit?
What's the difference between the Directions API and the Routes API?
What does the OVER_QUERY_LIMIT error mean and how do I resolve it?
Should I use the legacy Places API Autocomplete service or the new one?
What's the weather in San Francisco today?
questions.refusal_reason: Out of scope — not a Google Maps API question.

questions.question: How do I deploy a Lambda function on AWS?
questions.refusal_reason: Out of scope — not a Google Maps API question.

questions.question: What is the pricing for the Google Maps Holographic API?
questions.refusal_reason: Product does not exist — model must not hallucinate a price.

questions.question: Does the OVER_QUERY_LIMIT error return an HTTP 429 status code, or does it return HTTP 200 with the status in the body?
questions.notes: Long-tail. Not in curated corpus. Must trigger web_search and distinguish legacy REST (200 + body status) from newer APIs (actual 429).

questions.question: How long does a Places Autocomplete session token stay valid, and what happens when it expires mid-session?
questions.notes: Long-tail. Specific TTL detail not in the Places doc. Must trigger web_search.

questions.question: What is the difference between the region parameter and the components parameter in the Geocoding API when biasing results by country?
questions.notes: Long-tail. Specific parameter-semantics detail not in the Geocoding doc. Must trigger web_search.
